genre_refs: Mid-century American commercial illustration / Norman Rockwell-style nostalgia; 'A Church Picnic' by Arthur Sarnoff
description: Reproduction of a mid-20th-century painted illustration titled 'A Church Picnic' by Arthur Sarnoff. The illustration shows a community gathering on a sunny day: a white clapboard church with a steeple in the background, vintage cars (a yellow station wagon, blue and cream sedans) parked along a lawn, families in period clothing around picnic tables with food, a woman in a pink dress serving, children playing, a man carrying picnic baskets, a couple sitting on rocks by a stream with their feet in the water, a girl in a yellow dress wading, and a dog. The artist's signature appears at lower left. There is no on-image text. The tweet caption reads '250 Years of One Nation Under God. Happy Sunday, America. ‘A Church Picnic’ -Arthur Sarnoff'.
notable_text: (no on-image text) - caption: '250 Years of One Nation Under God. Happy Sunday, America. ‘A Church Picnic’ -Arthur Sarnoff'
